notes:
v1.2.2 Version Fix
🔧 Version number bumped to 1.2.2 to avoid Forge download errors for installs that briefly saw the accidental 1.2.1 manifest.

v1.1.1 Hotfix
🐛 Fixed Project FU price overrides like 123zenit being rejected as an unknown unit.

v1.1.0 Update
✨ Added native support for Starfinder 1e, Shadowrun 5e, Fabula Ultima, and SWADE.
✨ Added Shop Directory for tokenless shop access, with public shop visibility and buyer selection for players with multiple characters.
✨ Added bulk import, per-shop item descriptions, sell-back routing, minimize-to-dock windows, and public API hooks.
🐛 Fixed dialog stacking, config scroll retention, low-value sell prices, Display Stats scrolling, and duplicate localization keys.

announcement.title: 🛍️ Stylish Shop v1.2.2
announcement.content:
Stylish Shop v1.2.2 is ready.

  • The version number is set to 1.2.2 to avoid Forge download errors for installs that briefly saw the accidental 1.2.1 manifest.
  • Project FU price override values like 123zenit save correctly.
  • v1.1.0 adds Shop Directory, bulk import, item description overrides, sell-back routing, minimize-to-dock windows, public APIs, and new system adapters.
